problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: If Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
